titles.en: Reward of silence and going to the house of Allah on foot

text: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَیُّوبَ بْنِ نُوحٍ عَنِ الرَّبِیعِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ السُّلَمِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَا عُبِدَ اللَّهُ بِشَیْ ءٍ مِثْلِ الصَّمْتِ وَ الْمَشْیِ إِلَی بَیْتِ اللَّهِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ayoob’ b. Nuh from al-Rabee’ b. Muhammad al-Sulami from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “There is nothing among the worship of Allah better than silence and going to the house of Allah walking.”

text: : یَأْتِی عَلَی النَّاسِ زَمَانٌ یَکُونُ الْعَافِیَهُ عَشَرَهَ أَجْزَاءٍ تِسْعَهٌ مِنْهَا اعْتِزَالُ النَّاسِ وَ وَاحِدٌ فِی الصَّمْتِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan from Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. Ahmad from al-Abbas b. Ma’ruf from Ali b. Mahziyar who raised it to who said: “Soon a time will come when good things will rest on only ten things. Nine of them are keeping away from people and one is keeping silent.”

text: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُوسَی بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ رِبَاطٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ رِجَالِهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: لَا یَزَالُ الرَّجُلُ الْمُسْلِمُ یُکْتَبُ مُحْسِناً مَا دَامَ سَاکِتاً فَإِذَا تَکَلَّمَ کُتِبَ إِمَّا مُحْسِناً أَوْ مُسِیئاً.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 3. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Musa b. ’Amru from Ali b. al-Hussain b. Ribat from some of his men from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Good deeds are written for a Muslim till he is silent. As soon as he speaks, either a good deed or a sin is written down for him.”
